'''Ehartt Brihnt''' was a wealthy [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]].

Moving to the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] planet [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], Brihnt joined with three other hunters to establish big-game hunting and safari expeditions in the Etyyy or [[Rodian Hunting Grounds]] there. Brihnt allied himself with [[Sordaan Xris]], the wealthiest Rodian on Kashyyyk, which made him unpopular with many other safari hunters.

==Behind the scenes==
Ehartt Brihnt was a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by Sony Online Entertainment and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on December 15, 2011.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
